purpose: Canonical merged metadata brain for asset-driven Roblox AI game development across RobloxAIDev, EggBreakers, GroanTubeHero, and the shared local MCP store.

policy.trackedData: metadata only: asset ids, slots, statuses, inspections, queues, risks, and learnings
policy.excludedData: no .rbxl/.rbxm binaries, screenshots, meshes, thumbnails, cookies, or Roblox auth state
policy.sourceOfTruth: RobloxAIDev owns the cross-project merge; individual projects can keep richer local proof artifacts
policy.validationRule: Search metadata and offline file validation do not sign off visible game content without player-height screenshots from the correct active Studio place.

sources.role: Canonical installed MCP and implementation target.
Prior/parallel copy used for history comparison.
Prior/parallel copy used for history comparison.
Live local asset-search MCP memory shared across projects.
Egg Breakers world asset inventory, dream queue, and family inspection queue.
warnings: Catalog/storyboard cache only; final palette requires Studio geometry, script audit, and player-angle screenshots.
2026-06-05 asset pump added focused inventory/dream artifacts; no search-only candidate is release-ready.
No .rbxl, .rbxm, screenshots, meshes, or thumbnails are stored in this tree.

sources.role: Concert-defense WorldV2 asset audit, headless run, room dreamboard, and committed-palette fragments.

queues.why: The user reported ferns on their side; herbivore starter food and Fern Plains dressing need immediate family-level orientation proof.
acceptanceChecks: single family clean-spot clone captured from front/back/left/right/overhead/player height
fronds upright from player height
bottom geometry grounded with no sideways pivot
edible metadata preserved or stamped only on accepted food roots
all live clones using the same family updated before temp clone cleanup

queues.why: The user reported face-down dinosaurs; staged species and imported dino candidates need canonical up/forward before player/NPC use.
acceptanceChecks: model feet/down axis visible from clean-spot player-height view
forward axis faces movement/combat/action path rather than ground
helper roots and hitboxes hidden/non-colliding where appropriate
scripted imported dino models quarantined or rejected until reviewed
canonical fix propagated to player, NPC, and staged clone uses

queues.why: Beat 0 needs a readable egg/nest object that is not generic filler.
acceptanceChecks: egg/nest reads from the spawn path, not only overhead
scale fits hatchling/player camera
no uncontrolled scripts
grounded on nursery floor
safe to mark as required playable visual only after screenshot proof

queues.why: Carnivore survival needs food that reads as carrion/meat, not an abstract marker or museum fossil.
acceptanceChecks: reads as edible carnivore target from player height
not too large for first food interaction
does not imply non-edible museum-only fossil unless used as dressing
script-free or scripts removed
depletion/restore visual policy documented if used as food

queues.why: Swamp Delta needs water-surface and shoreline families that are easy to orient and ground.
acceptanceChecks: lily pads sit on water plane
trees/logs are grounded or intentionally waterline-placed
fish remain inside valid water volumes
spino sightline and camera clearance remain playable
family fixes recorded before broad scatter

queues.why: Canyon needs route-framing rocks, cliffs, fossils, and bones that do not block traversal.
acceptanceChecks: grounded on canyon terrain
does not create stuck spots
fossil display reads as landmark or food according to slot
scale does not occlude the camera on core route
accepted family has orientation metadata before repeated placement

queues.why: City assets are plentiful but script risk is high; use smaller script-free families first.
acceptanceChecks: script-free or imported scripts quarantined
sign/lamp/car forward direction useful from player path
wrecks and barriers do not trap players
ruins do not block camera or hide core landmarks
family propagation count recorded after placement

queues.why: Search is still weak for waypoint/scent assets; keep this as a dream lane until a safe UI/particle candidate exists.
acceptanceChecks: no false-direction arrows
no gameplay authority scripts from imported UI without review
readable on mobile and desktop
does not occlude hatch/action UI
kept separate from world placement asset signoff

rooms.multiplayerHook: Players split between cabinet defense, battery carry, and combo terminal repairs.
Hold platforms while waves arrive from track lanes; teammates rotate signal switches.
One player performs callouts while others protect stage speakers and curtain levers.
Team keeps bubble generators alive while rhythm zones flood and drain.
Low-gravity note lanes and shared oxygen relays; players must sync pressure doors.
Players defend order counters and deliver beat tokens under crowd pressure.
Scrap lanes spawn hazards; players rebuild broken speakers from collected parts.
Crew controls broadcast towers while moving across docks and cargo stacks.
Floating platforms drift; players vote rotating chorus lanes and protect idol plinths.
Players cool server racks and purge viral panels before heat overloads the room.
Maze-like pressure valves; players must regroup at safe beats or lose combo heat.
Teams activate relic drums in sequence while traps scramble note lanes.

queues.why: Prior GroanTubeHero work translated room dreams into asset-search-ready multiplayer expansion lanes.

hardLearnings.lesson: Generate and merge Roblox files headlessly for speed; reserve Studio for load, runtime, screenshot, and visual/player proof.
evidence: GroanTubeHero headless run validated manifest merge and Rojo build before Studio

hardLearnings.lesson: A single Studio MCP/plugin must be leader-gated; batch tools should verify the active place before running screenshots or tests.
evidence: GroanTubeHero headless run saw Studio MCP report old eggBreakers3.rbxl
EggBreakers swarm handoff documents one shared Studio plugin/port and leader-only Studio use

hardLearnings.lesson: Orientation/scale fixes must be applied at asset-family scope and proven with clean-spot plus in-world player-height captures.
evidence: EggBreakers family inspection queue blocks ferns/dinos on clean-spot screenshots, propagation counts, and live player-angle proof

hardLearnings.lesson: Creator Store assets enter quarantine/inbox, scripts are stripped or quarantined, clean ArtAssets sources are promoted, and only those sources are cloned into active worlds.
evidence: GroanTubeHero asset_manifest_real.md records script quarantine and clean ReplicatedStorage.ArtAssets promotion

hardLearnings.lesson: Committed palette fragments can be structurally valid while publish permission remains missing; release gates must keep permission proof separate from visual proof.
evidence: GroanTubeHero committed-palette fragment manifests mark publish_permission_status=missing
